text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Tokyo Daishoten, and Oi
Racecourse is packed with an unbelievable
number of spectators.

Inspired by Smart Falcon's passion, her fans have
taken it upon themselves to spread the word,
bringing a record number of people to the venue
for her greatest stage yet.

Nothing could possibly make Smart Falcon
happier than she is right now—except perhaps for
one last thing...

If she can shine upon this greatest of stages, that
will surely be the greatest happiness of all. In
order to become a top Umadol, Smart Falcon
heads to the final performance of her tour.
